name: Silent Sector
short_description: Oldschool action open-world sci-fi with a unique storyline, frenetic battles, crude humor, loose morals and cows.
detailed_description:
Silent Sector is an old-school open world sci-fi RPG with frenetic battles, crude humor, loose morals and cows. Created with endless love; especially for fans of space pirates, sci-fi westerns and alien encounters!

Silent Sector takes us to a remote part of the galaxy where several factions fight each other over the profits in a new gold rush - in pursuit of an extraordinarily valuable mineral called Eldorite.

Our hero comes into this Wild West universe and very quickly loses both their ship and cargo. You must find a way to repay the debt and take your revenge against Admiral Zed. This truly miserable corner of the universe offers you a chance to try your luck at becoming a successful merchant, rich miner, feared mercenary or a famous adventurer.



In the game you will find:

  • Space sim, adventure story, and quick dogfights all in one package.
  • Crawl the large semi-randomly-generated open world space in dozens unique ships.
  • More guns, missiles, lasers and upgrades than a space cow cannot count.
  • Help one of 7 factions destroy their rivals in a series of breathtaking quests and witness the horrible aftermath of your choices!
  • Explore the mysteries of the universe and fulfill countless of random quests and events full of crude humor.
  • Enjoy an atmospheric Wild West inspired soundtrack!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Czech, Bulgarian, Polish, Russian
